# Terms Of Service



## 1. Acceptance Of Terms

By accessing or using BCAS-Team.github.io, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you must not access the site.



## 2. Eligibility

You must be **18 years or older** to access age-restricted content. By using this site, you confirm that you meet this requirement.



## 3. Use Of Content

All content is provided for **educational and informational purposes only**. You may not:

- Use any material for illegal activities

- Reproduce or redistribute content without permission

- Circumvent age-gating systems



## 4. User Contributions

All community-submitted content is manually reviewed. You may not contribute material that is:

- Illegal or promotes illegal activity

- Hateful, abusive, or harassing

- Violating any third-party rights



## 5. Intellectual Property

All original content is © BCAS Team unless otherwise stated. Third-party materials are attributed where applicable.



## 6. Disclaimers

We do not guarantee the accuracy or legality of any information provided. No content is professional advice. Use at your own risk.



## 7. Limitation Of Liability

BCAS Team, its maintainers, and contributors are not liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from use of the site.



## 8. Changes To Terms

We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
